description: Address review feedback: fix slime spawns to use chunk-seeded hash, add monster darkness check to drowned spawns, add ambient mob despawn distance override, and prevent named mobs from despawning.
steps: In pumpkin/src/entity/type.rs, add is_slime_chunk() function using chunk coordinate hash and fix check_slime_spawn_rules to only allow below-Y=40 spawns in slime chunks (~10%)
In pumpkin/src/entity/type.rs, change DROWNED spawn rules to require BOTH water AND monster darkness checks
In pumpkin/src/entity/mob/mod.rs, add ambient mob (bat) shorter despawn distance of 64 blocks in check_despawn
In pumpkin/src/entity/mob/mod.rs, add named entity persistence check at the top of check_despawn
acceptance_criteria: Slime spawns below Y=40 are restricted to ~10% of chunks via coordinate hash
Drowned requires both water presence and monster darkness rules
Ambient mobs despawn at 64 blocks instead of 128
Named mobs (entities with custom_name set) never despawn
Code compiles without clippy errors on pumpkin crate
verification: Run: export RUSTUP_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.rustup && export CARGO_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.cargo && export PATH=/opt/toolchains/.rustup/toolchains/1.95.0-x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu/bin:/opt/toolchains/.cargo/bin:$PATH && cargo check -p pumpkin 2>&1 | grep -v wasmtime | tail -10
